# Substrate roadmap — frontier tension

being pulled next?). Paired with x8888_agents.myc.md (state, "що я бачу"),

## Pulling forward — horizons declared by organs

Aggregated from `horizon:` header fields. Each line is what THAT organ thinks
should come next; together they describe the substrate's declared frontier.

### Bucket 3 (3 declared horizons)

- **x3500_chord_play** [active] — extend to new chord coordinate-naming
  convention (x<type>_<block>_<voice>_<slug>.md)
- **x3A00_balance** [active] — extend balance suggestions to use gravity metric
  (mean Δprimary) as secondary signal
- **x3C00_recipes** [active] — cross-link recipes to gravity-flagged drift
  signals (recipe-as-remediation)

### Bucket 8 (2 declared horizons)

- **x8800_agents_gen** [active] — extend with bucket-hash-driven incremental
  regen (only re-render buckets with manifest drift)
- **x8C00_skill_gen** [active] — extend with skill_tag/skill_safe consistency
  audit (currently warns invalid, doesn't validate tag-vs-actual-behavior)
